_comment: Master switch for OneMekong Hydropower cron syncs. Set any 'enabled' to false to pause that sync without deleting the cron. Set 'all_enabled' to false to pause everything. Edit and commit this file to the lao-hydropower-data repo — each cron reads it at runtime.

pdc.description: PDC disaster alerts (flood watersheds + storm tracks). Daily at 8 AM Bangkok.

rainfall_flood.description: Open-Meteo rainfall grid + GloFAS per-dam discharge. Every 6 hours.

mrc.description: MRC water-level station readings. Hourly. PAUSED 2026-06-03 by user request.

cascade.description: Lao MEM dam safety daily report. Daily at 4 PM Bangkok. (Cron 0f858deb)
